name: Lead Time Weekly Trend (P50, P85, Geom. Mean)
query:
WITH weekly_stats AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('week', v_facts.event_end_at)::date AS week_start,
        EXP(AVG(LN(NULLIF(v_facts.value, 0)))) AS geometric_mean_days,
        PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY v_facts.value) AS median_days,
        PERCENTILE_CONT(0.85) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY v_facts.value) AS p85_days
    FROM metrics.v_facts
    WHERE v_facts.calc_code = 'lead_time_days'
      [[ AND {{issue_type}} -- ]] AND v_facts.slice_rule_id IS NULL
      [[AND {{project_key}}]]
      [[AND {{completion_date}}]]
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', v_facts.event_end_at)::date
)
SELECT
    week_start,
    geometric_mean_days,
    median_days,
    p85_days,
    AVG(median_days) OVER (
        ORDER BY week_start
        ROWS BETWEEN 3 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ) AS rolling_4w_median
FROM weekly_stats
ORDER BY week_start ASC
